bpy.ops.mesh.beautify_fill(angle_limit)

name: bpy.ops.mesh.bevel
text:
bpy.ops.mesh.bevel(offset_type, offset, profile_type, offset_pct, segments, profile, affect, clamp_overlap, loop_slide, mark_seam, mark_sharp, material, harden_normals, face_strength_mode, miter_outer, miter_inner, spread, vmesh_method, release_confirm)
  Cut into selected items at an angle to create bevel or chamfer
    offset_type (ENUM in OFFSET|WIDTH|DEPTH|PERCENT|ABSOLUTE) - The method for determining the size of the bevel
    offset (FLOAT) - Bevel amount
    profile_type (ENUM in SUPERELLIPSE|CUSTOM) - The type of shape used to rebuild a beveled section
    offset_pct (FLOAT) - Bevel amount for percentage method
    segments (INT) - Segments for curved edge
    profile (FLOAT) - Controls profile shape (0.5 = round)
    affect (ENUM in VERTICES|EDGES) - Affect edges or vertices
    clamp_overlap (BOOLEAN) - Do not allow beveled edges/vertices to overlap each other
    loop_slide (BOOLEAN) - Prefer sliding along edges to even widths
    mark_seam (BOOLEAN) - Preserve seams along beveled edges
    mark_sharp (BOOLEAN) - Preserve sharp edges along beveled edges
    material (INT) - Material for bevel faces (-1 means use adjacent faces)
    harden_normals (BOOLEAN) - Match normals of new faces to adjacent faces
    face_strength_mode (ENUM in NONE|NEW|AFFECTED|ALL) - Whether to set face strength, and which faces to set face strength on
    miter_outer (ENUM in SHARP|PATCH|ARC) - Pattern to use for outside of miters
    miter_inner (ENUM in SHARP|ARC) - Pattern to use for inside of miters
    spread (FLOAT) - Amount to spread arcs for arc inner miters
    vmesh_method (ENUM in ADJ|CUTOFF) - The method to use to create meshes at intersections
    release_confirm (BOOLEAN)

name: bpy.ops.mesh.bisect
text:
bpy.ops.mesh.bisect(plane_co, plane_no, use_fill, clear_inner, clear_outer, threshold, xstart, xend, ystart, yend, flip, cursor)
  Cut geometry along a plane (click-drag to define plane)
    plane_co (FLOAT[3]) - A point on the plane
    plane_no (FLOAT[3]) - The direction the plane points
    use_fill (BOOLEAN) - Fill in the cut
    clear_inner (BOOLEAN) - Remove geometry behind the plane
    clear_outer (BOOLEAN) - Remove geometry in front of the plane
    threshold (FLOAT) - Preserves the existing geometry along the cut plane
    xstart (INT)
    xend (INT)
    ystart (INT)
    yend (INT)
    flip (BOOLEAN)
    cursor (INT) - Mouse cursor style to use during the modal operator

name: bpy.ops.mesh.bridge_edge_loops

bpy.ops.mesh.bridge_edge_loops(type, use_merge, merge_factor, twist_offset, number_cuts, interpolation, smoothness, profile_shape_factor, profile_shape)

name: bpy.ops.mesh.convex_hull
text:
bpy.ops.mesh.convex_hull(delete_unused, use_existing_faces, make_holes, join_triangles, face_threshold, shape_threshold, topology_influence, uvs, vcols, seam, sharp, materials, deselect_joined)
  Enclose selected vertices in a convex polyhedron
    delete_unused (BOOLEAN) - Delete selected elements that are not used by the hull
    use_existing_faces (BOOLEAN) - Skip hull triangles that are covered by a pre-existing face
    make_holes (BOOLEAN) - Delete selected faces that are used by the hull
    join_triangles (BOOLEAN) - Merge adjacent triangles into quads
    face_threshold (FLOAT) - Face angle limit
    shape_threshold (FLOAT) - Shape angle limit
    topology_influence (FLOAT) - How much to prioritize regular grids of quads as well as quads that touch existing quads
    uvs (BOOLEAN)
    vcols (BOOLEAN)
    seam (BOOLEAN)
    sharp (BOOLEAN)
    materials (BOOLEAN)
    deselect_joined (BOOLEAN) - Only select remaining triangles that were not merged

name: bpy.ops.object.bake
text:
bpy.ops.object.bake(type, pass_filter, filepath, width, height, margin, margin_type, use_selected_to_active, max_ray_distance, cage_extrusion, cage_object, normal_space, normal_r, normal_g, normal_b, target, save_mode, use_clear, use_cage, use_split_materials, use_automatic_name, uv_layer)
  Bake image textures of selected objects
    type (ENUM in COMBINED|AO|SHADOW|POSITION|NORMAL|UV|ROUGHNESS|EMIT|ENVIRONMENT|DIFFUSE|GLOSSY|TRANSMISSION) - Type of pass to bake, some of them may not be supported by the current render engine
    pass_filter (ENUM in NONE|EMIT|DIRECT|INDIRECT|COLOR|DIFFUSE|GLOSSY|TRANSMISSION) - Filter to combined, diffuse, glossy, transmission and subsurface passes
    filepath (STRING) - Image filepath to use when saving externally
    width (INT) - Horizontal dimension of the baking map (external only)
    height (INT) - Vertical dimension of the baking map (external only)
    margin (INT) - Extends the baked result as a post process filter
    margin_type (ENUM in ADJACENT_FACES|EXTEND) - Which algorithm to use to generate the margin
    use_selected_to_active (BOOLEAN) - Bake shading on the surface of selected objects to the active object
    max_ray_distance (FLOAT) - The maximum ray distance for matching points between the active and selected objects. If zero, there is no limit
    cage_extrusion (FLOAT) - Inflate the active object by the specified distance for baking. This helps matching to points nearer to the outside of the selected object meshes
    cage_object (STRING) - Object to use as cage, instead of calculating the cage from the active object with cage extrusion
    normal_space (ENUM in OBJECT|TANGENT) - Choose normal space for baking
    normal_r (ENUM in POS_X|POS_Y|POS_Z|NEG_X|NEG_Y|NEG_Z) - Axis to bake in red channel
    normal_g (ENUM in POS_X|POS_Y|POS_Z|NEG_X|NEG_Y|NEG_Z) - Axis to bake in green channel
    normal_b (ENUM in POS_X|POS_Y|POS_Z|NEG_X|NEG_Y|NEG_Z) - Axis to bake in blue channel
    target (ENUM in IMAGE_TEXTURES|VERTEX_COLORS) - Where to output the baked map
    save_mode (ENUM in INTERNAL|EXTERNAL) - Where to save baked image textures
    use_clear (BOOLEAN) - Clear images before baking (only for internal saving)
    use_cage (BOOLEAN) - Cast rays to active object from a cage
    use_split_materials (BOOLEAN) - Split baked maps per material, using material name in output file (external only)
    use_automatic_name (BOOLEAN) - Automatically name the output file with the pass type
    uv_layer (STRING) - UV layer to override active

name: bpy.ops.object.data_transfer
text:
bpy.ops.object.data_transfer(use_reverse_transfer, use_freeze, data_type, use_create, vert_mapping, edge_mapping, loop_mapping, poly_mapping, use_auto_transform, use_object_transform, use_max_distance, max_distance, ray_radius, islands_precision, layers_select_src, layers_select_dst, mix_mode, mix_factor)
  Transfer data layer(s) (weights, edge sharp, etc.) from active to selected meshes
    use_reverse_transfer (BOOLEAN) - Transfer from selected objects to active one
    use_freeze (BOOLEAN) - Prevent changes to settings to re-run the operator, handy to change several things at once with heavy geometry
    data_type (ENUM in VGROUP_WEIGHTS|BEVEL_WEIGHT_VERT|COLOR_VERTEX|SHARP_EDGE|SEAM|CREASE|BEVEL_WEIGHT_EDGE|FREESTYLE_EDGE|CUSTOM_NORMAL|COLOR_CORNER|UV|SMOOTH|FREESTYLE_FACE) - Which data to transfer
    use_create (BOOLEAN) - Add data layers on destination meshes if needed
    vert_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|NEAREST|EDGE_NEAREST|EDGEINTERP_NEAREST|POLY_NEAREST|POLYINTERP_NEAREST|POLYINTERP_VNORPROJ) - Method used to map source vertices to destination ones
    edge_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|VERT_NEAREST|NEAREST|POLY_NEAREST|EDGEINTERP_VNORPROJ) - Method used to map source edges to destination ones
    loop_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|NEAREST_NORMAL|NEAREST_POLYNOR|NEAREST_POLY|POLYINTERP_NEAREST|POLYINTERP_LNORPROJ) - Method used to map source faces' corners to destination ones
    poly_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|NEAREST|NORMAL|POLYINTERP_PNORPROJ) - Method used to map source faces to destination ones
    use_auto_transform (BOOLEAN) - Automatically compute transformation to get the best possible match between source and destination meshes.
Warning: Results will never be as good as manual matching of objects
    use_object_transform (BOOLEAN) - Evaluate source and destination meshes in global space
    use_max_distance (BOOLEAN) - Source elements must be closer than given distance from destination one
    max_distance (FLOAT) - Maximum allowed distance between source and destination element, for non-topology mappings
    ray_radius (FLOAT) - 'Width' of rays (especially useful when raycasting against vertices or edges)
    islands_precision (FLOAT) - Factor controlling precision of islands handling (the higher, the better the results)
    layers_select_src (ENUM in ACTIVE|ALL|BONE_SELECT|BONE_DEFORM) - Which layers to transfer, in case of multi-layers types
    layers_select_dst (ENUM in ACTIVE|NAME|INDEX) - How to match source and destination layers
    mix_mode (ENUM in REPLACE|ABOVE_THRESHOLD|BELOW_THRESHOLD|MIX|ADD|SUB|MUL) - How to affect destination elements with source values
    mix_factor (FLOAT) - Factor to use when applying data to destination (exact behavior depends on mix mode)

text:
bpy.ops.object.quadriflow_remesh(use_mesh_symmetry, use_preserve_sharp, use_preserve_boundary, preserve_attributes, smooth_normals, mode, target_ratio, target_edge_length, target_faces, mesh_area, seed)
  Create a new quad based mesh using the surface data of the current mesh. All data layers will be lost
    use_mesh_symmetry (BOOLEAN) - Generates a symmetrical mesh using the mesh symmetry configuration
    use_preserve_sharp (BOOLEAN) - Try to preserve sharp features on the mesh
    use_preserve_boundary (BOOLEAN) - Try to preserve mesh boundary on the mesh
    preserve_attributes (BOOLEAN) - Reproject attributes onto the new mesh
    smooth_normals (BOOLEAN) - Set the output mesh normals to smooth
    mode (ENUM in RATIO|EDGE|FACES) - How to specify the amount of detail for the new mesh
    target_ratio (FLOAT) - Relative number of faces compared to the current mesh
    target_edge_length (FLOAT) - Target edge length in the new mesh
    target_faces (INT) - Approximate number of faces (quads) in the new mesh
    mesh_area (FLOAT) - This property is only used to cache the object area for later calculations
    seed (INT) - Random seed to use with the solver. Different seeds will cause the remesher to come up with different quad layouts on the mesh

bpy.ops.transform.translate(value, orient_type, orient_matrix, orient_matrix_type, constraint_axis, mirror, use_proportional_edit, proportional_edit_falloff, proportional_size, use_proportional_connected, use_proportional_projected, snap, snap_elements, use_snap_project, snap_target, use_snap_self, use_snap_edit, use_snap_nonedit, use_snap_selectable, snap_point, snap_align, snap_normal, gpencil_strokes, cursor_transform, texture_space, remove_on_cancel, use_duplicated_keyframes, view2d_edge_pan, release_confirm, use_accurate, use_automerge_and_split, translate_origin)

    use_proportional_edit (BOOLEAN)

    use_proportional_connected (BOOLEAN)
    use_proportional_projected (BOOLEAN)
    snap (BOOLEAN)
    snap_elements (ENUM in INCREMENT|GRID|VERTEX|EDGE|FACE|VOLUME|EDGE_MIDPOINT|EDGE_PERPENDICULAR|FACE_MIDPOINT|FACE_PROJECT|FACE_NEAREST)
    use_snap_project (BOOLEAN)
    snap_target (ENUM in CLOSEST|CENTER|MEDIAN|ACTIVE) - Point on source that will snap to target
    use_snap_self (BOOLEAN)
    use_snap_edit (BOOLEAN)
    use_snap_nonedit (BOOLEAN)
    use_snap_selectable (BOOLEAN)
    snap_point (FLOAT[3])
    snap_align (BOOLEAN)
    snap_normal (FLOAT[3])

    use_duplicated_keyframes (BOOLEAN) - Transform duplicated keyframes

name: modifier:DATA_TRANSFER
text:
DataTransferModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='DATA_TRANSFER')
  Transfer several types of data (vertex groups, UV maps, vertex colors, custom normals) from one mesh to another
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Object to transfer data from
    use_object_transform (BOOLEAN) - Evaluate source and destination meshes in global space
    use_vert_data (BOOLEAN) - Enable vertex data transfer
    use_edge_data (BOOLEAN) - Enable edge data transfer
    use_loop_data (BOOLEAN) - Enable face corner data transfer
    use_poly_data (BOOLEAN) - Enable face data transfer
    data_types_verts (ENUM in VGROUP_WEIGHTS|BEVEL_WEIGHT_VERT|COLOR_VERTEX) - Which vertex data layers to transfer
    data_types_edges (ENUM in SHARP_EDGE|SEAM|CREASE|BEVEL_WEIGHT_EDGE|FREESTYLE_EDGE) - Which edge data layers to transfer
    data_types_loops (ENUM in CUSTOM_NORMAL|COLOR_CORNER|UV) - Which face corner data layers to transfer
    data_types_polys (ENUM in SMOOTH|FREESTYLE_FACE) - Which face data layers to transfer
    vert_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|NEAREST|EDGE_NEAREST|EDGEINTERP_NEAREST|POLY_NEAREST|POLYINTERP_NEAREST|POLYINTERP_VNORPROJ) - Method used to map source vertices to destination ones
    edge_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|VERT_NEAREST|NEAREST|POLY_NEAREST|EDGEINTERP_VNORPROJ) - Method used to map source edges to destination ones
    loop_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|NEAREST_NORMAL|NEAREST_POLYNOR|NEAREST_POLY|POLYINTERP_NEAREST|POLYINTERP_LNORPROJ) - Method used to map source faces' corners to destination ones
    poly_mapping (ENUM in TOPOLOGY|NEAREST|NORMAL|POLYINTERP_PNORPROJ) - Method used to map source faces to destination ones
    use_max_distance (BOOLEAN) - Source elements must be closer than given distance from destination one
    max_distance (FLOAT) - Maximum allowed distance between source and destination element, for non-topology mappings
    ray_radius (FLOAT) - 'Width' of rays (especially useful when raycasting against vertices or edges)
    islands_precision (FLOAT) - Factor controlling precision of islands handling (typically, 0.1 should be enough, higher values can make things really slow)
    layers_vgroup_select_src (ENUM in ACTIVE|ALL|BONE_SELECT|BONE_DEFORM) - Which layers to transfer, in case of multi-layers types
    layers_vcol_vert_select_src (ENUM in ACTIVE|ALL|BONE_SELECT|BONE_DEFORM) - Which layers to transfer, in case of multi-layers types
    layers_vcol_loop_select_src (ENUM in ACTIVE|ALL|BONE_SELECT|BONE_DEFORM) - Which layers to transfer, in case of multi-layers types
    layers_uv_select_src (ENUM in ACTIVE|ALL|BONE_SELECT|BONE_DEFORM) - Which layers to transfer, in case of multi-layers types
    layers_vgroup_select_dst (ENUM in ACTIVE|NAME|INDEX) - How to match source and destination layers
    layers_vcol_vert_select_dst (ENUM in ACTIVE|NAME|INDEX) - How to match source and destination layers
    layers_vcol_loop_select_dst (ENUM in ACTIVE|NAME|INDEX) - How to match source and destination layers
    layers_uv_select_dst (ENUM in ACTIVE|NAME|INDEX) - How to match source and destination layers
    mix_mode (ENUM in REPLACE|ABOVE_THRESHOLD|BELOW_THRESHOLD|MIX|ADD|SUB|MUL) - How to affect destination elements with source values
    mix_factor (FLOAT) - Factor to use when applying data to destination (exact behavior depends on mix mode, multiplied with weights from vertex group when defined)
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for selecting the affected areas
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:MESH_CACHE
text:
MeshCacheModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='MESH_CACHE')
  Deform the mesh using an external frame-by-frame vertex transform cache
  Properties:
    cache_format (ENUM in MDD|PC2)
    interpolation (ENUM in NONE|LINEAR)
    time_mode (ENUM in FRAME|TIME|FACTOR) - Method to control playback time
    play_mode (ENUM in SCENE|CUSTOM)
    deform_mode (ENUM in OVERWRITE|INTEGRATE)
    filepath (STRING) - Path to external displacements file
    factor (FLOAT) - Influence of the deformation
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of the Vertex Group which determines the influence of the modifier per point
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    forward_axis (ENUM in POS_X|POS_Y|POS_Z|NEG_X|NEG_Y|NEG_Z)
    up_axis (ENUM in POS_X|POS_Y|POS_Z|NEG_X|NEG_Y|NEG_Z)
    flip_axis (BOOLEAN)
    frame_start (FLOAT) - Add this to the start frame
    frame_scale (FLOAT) - Evaluation time in seconds
    eval_frame (FLOAT) - The frame to evaluate (starting at 0)
    eval_time (FLOAT) - Evaluation time in seconds
    eval_factor (FLOAT) - Evaluation time in seconds

name: modifier:MESH_SEQUENCE_CACHE
text:
MeshSequenceCacheModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='MESH_SEQUENCE_CACHE')
  Deform the mesh or curve using an external mesh cache in Alembic format
  Properties:
    cache_file (POINTER)
    object_path (STRING) - Path to the object in the Alembic archive used to lookup geometric data
    read_data (ENUM in VERT|POLY|UV|COLOR|ATTRIBUTES) - Data to read from the cache
    use_vertex_interpolation (BOOLEAN) - Allow interpolation of vertex positions
    velocity_scale (FLOAT) - Multiplier used to control the magnitude of the velocity vectors for time effects

name: modifier:NORMAL_EDIT
text:
NormalEditModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='NORMAL_EDIT')
  Modify the direction of the surface normals
  Properties:
    mode (ENUM in RADIAL|DIRECTIONAL) - How to affect (generate) normals
    offset (FLOAT[3]) - Offset from object's center
    mix_mode (ENUM in COPY|ADD|SUB|MUL) - How to mix generated normals with existing ones
    mix_factor (FLOAT) - How much of generated normals to mix with existing ones
    mix_limit (FLOAT) - Maximum angle between old and new normals
    no_polynors_fix (BOOLEAN) - Do not flip polygons when their normals are not consistent with their newly computed custom vertex normals
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for selecting/weighting the affected areas
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    target (POINTER) - Target object used to affect normals
    use_direction_parallel (BOOLEAN) - Use same direction for all normals, from origin to target's center (Directional mode only)

name: modifier:WEIGHTED_NORMAL
text:
WeightedNormalModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='WEIGHTED_NORMAL')
  Modify the direction of the surface normals using a weighting method
  Properties:
    weight (INT) - Corrective factor applied to faces' weights, 50 is neutral, lower values increase weight of weak faces, higher values increase weight of strong faces
    mode (ENUM in FACE_AREA|CORNER_ANGLE|FACE_AREA_WITH_ANGLE) - Weighted vertex normal mode to use
    thresh (FLOAT) - Threshold value for different weights to be considered equal
    keep_sharp (BOOLEAN) - Keep sharp edges as computed for default custom normals, instead of setting a single weighted normal for each vertex
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for modifying the selected areas
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    use_face_influence (BOOLEAN) - Use influence of face for weighting

name: modifier:UV_PROJECT
text:
UVProjectModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='UV_PROJECT')
  Project the UV map coordinates from the negative Z axis of another object
  Properties:
    uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    projector_count (INT) - Number of projectors to use
    projectors (COLLECTION)
    aspect_x (FLOAT) - Horizontal aspect ratio (only used for camera projectors)
    aspect_y (FLOAT) - Vertical aspect ratio (only used for camera projectors)
    scale_x (FLOAT) - Horizontal scale (only used for camera projectors)
    scale_y (FLOAT) - Vertical scale (only used for camera projectors)

name: modifier:UV_WARP
text:
UVWarpModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='UV_WARP')
  Transform the UV map using the difference between two objects
  Properties:
    axis_u (ENUM in X|Y|Z) - Pole axis for rotation
    axis_v (ENUM in X|Y|Z) - Pole axis for rotation
    center (FLOAT[2]) - Center point for rotate/scale
    offset (FLOAT[2]) - 2D Offset for the warp
    scale (FLOAT[2]) - 2D Scale for the warp
    rotation (FLOAT) - 2D Rotation for the warp
    object_from (POINTER) - Object defining offset
    bone_from (STRING) - Bone defining offset
    object_to (POINTER) - Object defining offset
    bone_to (STRING) - Bone defining offset
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name

name: modifier:VERTEX_WEIGHT_EDIT
text:
VertexWeightEditModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='VERTEX_WEIGHT_EDIT')
  Modify of the weights of a vertex group
  Properties:
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    falloff_type (ENUM in LINEAR|CURVE|SHARP|SMOOTH|ROOT|ICON_SPHERECURVE|RANDOM|STEP) - How weights are mapped to their new values
    invert_falloff (BOOLEAN) - Invert the resulting falloff weight
    normalize (BOOLEAN) - Normalize the resulting weights (otherwise they are only clamped within 0.0 to 1.0 range)
    map_curve (POINTER) - Custom mapping curve
    use_add (BOOLEAN) - Add vertices with weight over threshold to vgroup
    use_remove (BOOLEAN) - Remove vertices with weight below threshold from vgroup
    default_weight (FLOAT) - Default weight a vertex will have if it is not in the vgroup
    add_threshold (FLOAT) - Lower (inclusive) bound for a vertex's weight to be added to the vgroup
    remove_threshold (FLOAT) - Upper (inclusive) bound for a vertex's weight to be removed from the vgroup
    mask_constant (FLOAT) - Global influence of current modifications on vgroup
    mask_vertex_group (STRING) - Masking vertex group name
    invert_mask_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group mask influence
    mask_texture (POINTER) - Masking texture
    mask_tex_use_channel (ENUM in INT|RED|GREEN|BLUE|HUE|SAT|VAL|ALPHA) - Which texture channel to use for masking
    mask_tex_mapping (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL|OBJECT|UV) - Which texture coordinates to use for mapping
    mask_tex_uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    mask_tex_map_object (POINTER) - Which object to take texture coordinates from
    mask_tex_map_bone (STRING) - Which bone to take texture coordinates from

name: modifier:VERTEX_WEIGHT_MIX
text:
VertexWeightMixModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='VERTEX_WEIGHT_MIX')
  Mix the weights of two vertex groups
  Properties:
    vertex_group_a (STRING) - First vertex group name
    vertex_group_b (STRING) - Second vertex group name
    invert_vertex_group_a (BOOLEAN) - Invert the influence of vertex group A
    invert_vertex_group_b (BOOLEAN) - Invert the influence of vertex group B
    default_weight_a (FLOAT) - Default weight a vertex will have if it is not in the first A vgroup
    default_weight_b (FLOAT) - Default weight a vertex will have if it is not in the second B vgroup
    mix_mode (ENUM in SET|ADD|SUB|MUL|DIV|DIF|AVG|MIN|MAX) - How weights from vgroup B affect weights of vgroup A
    mix_set (ENUM in ALL|A|B|OR|AND) - Which vertices should be affected
    normalize (BOOLEAN) - Normalize the resulting weights (otherwise they are only clamped within 0.0 to 1.0 range)
    mask_constant (FLOAT) - Global influence of current modifications on vgroup
    mask_vertex_group (STRING) - Masking vertex group name
    invert_mask_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group mask influence
    mask_texture (POINTER) - Masking texture
    mask_tex_use_channel (ENUM in INT|RED|GREEN|BLUE|HUE|SAT|VAL|ALPHA) - Which texture channel to use for masking
    mask_tex_mapping (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL|OBJECT|UV) - Which texture coordinates to use for mapping
    mask_tex_uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    mask_tex_map_object (POINTER) - Which object to take texture coordinates from
    mask_tex_map_bone (STRING) - Which bone to take texture coordinates from

name: modifier:VERTEX_WEIGHT_PROXIMITY
text:
VertexWeightProximityModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='VERTEX_WEIGHT_PROXIMITY')
  Set the vertex group weights based on the distance to another target object
  Properties:
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    proximity_mode (ENUM in OBJECT|GEOMETRY) - Which distances to target object to use
    proximity_geometry (ENUM in VERTEX|EDGE|FACE) - Use the shortest computed distance to target object's geometry as weight
    target (POINTER) - Object to calculate vertices distances from
    min_dist (FLOAT) - Distance mapping to weight 0.0
    max_dist (FLOAT) - Distance mapping to weight 1.0
    falloff_type (ENUM in LINEAR|CURVE|SHARP|SMOOTH|ROOT|ICON_SPHERECURVE|RANDOM|STEP) - How weights are mapped to their new values
    invert_falloff (BOOLEAN) - Invert the resulting falloff weight
    normalize (BOOLEAN) - Normalize the resulting weights (otherwise they are only clamped within 0.0 to 1.0 range)
    map_curve (POINTER) - Custom mapping curve
    mask_constant (FLOAT) - Global influence of current modifications on vgroup
    mask_vertex_group (STRING) - Masking vertex group name
    invert_mask_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group mask influence
    mask_texture (POINTER) - Masking texture
    mask_tex_use_channel (ENUM in INT|RED|GREEN|BLUE|HUE|SAT|VAL|ALPHA) - Which texture channel to use for masking
    mask_tex_mapping (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL|OBJECT|UV) - Which texture coordinates to use for mapping
    mask_tex_uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    mask_tex_map_object (POINTER) - Which object to take texture coordinates from
    mask_tex_map_bone (STRING) - Which bone to take texture coordinates from

name: modifier:ARRAY
text:
ArrayModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='ARRAY')
  Create copies of the shape with offsets
  Properties:
    fit_type (ENUM in FIXED_COUNT|FIT_LENGTH|FIT_CURVE) - Array length calculation method
    count (INT) - Number of duplicates to make
    fit_length (FLOAT) - Length to fit array within
    curve (POINTER) - Curve object to fit array length to
    use_constant_offset (BOOLEAN) - Add a constant offset
    constant_offset_displace (FLOAT[3]) - Value for the distance between arrayed items
    use_relative_offset (BOOLEAN) - Add an offset relative to the object's bounding box
    relative_offset_displace (FLOAT[3]) - The size of the geometry will determine the distance between arrayed items
    use_merge_vertices (BOOLEAN) - Merge vertices in adjacent duplicates
    use_merge_vertices_cap (BOOLEAN) - Merge vertices in first and last duplicates
    merge_threshold (FLOAT) - Limit below which to merge vertices
    use_object_offset (BOOLEAN) - Add another object's transformation to the total offset
    offset_object (POINTER) - Use the location and rotation of another object to determine the distance and rotational change between arrayed items
    start_cap (POINTER) - Mesh object to use as a start cap
    end_cap (POINTER) - Mesh object to use as an end cap
    offset_u (FLOAT) - Amount to offset array UVs on the U axis
    offset_v (FLOAT) - Amount to offset array UVs on the V axis

name: modifier:BEVEL
text:
BevelModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='BEVEL')
  Generate sloped corners by adding geometry to the mesh's edges or vertices
  Properties:
    width (FLOAT) - Bevel amount
    width_pct (FLOAT) - Bevel amount for percentage method
    segments (INT) - Number of segments for round edges/verts
    affect (ENUM in VERTICES|EDGES) - Affect edges or vertices
    limit_method (ENUM in NONE|ANGLE|WEIGHT|VGROUP)
    edge_weight (STRING) - Attribute name for edge weight
    vertex_weight (STRING) - Attribute name for vertex weight
    angle_limit (FLOAT) - Angle above which to bevel edges
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    use_clamp_overlap (BOOLEAN) - Clamp the width to avoid overlap
    offset_type (ENUM in OFFSET|WIDTH|DEPTH|PERCENT|ABSOLUTE) - What distance Width measures
    profile_type (ENUM in SUPERELLIPSE|CUSTOM) - The type of shape used to rebuild a beveled section
    profile (FLOAT) - The profile shape (0.5 = round)
    material (INT) - Material index of generated faces, -1 for automatic
    loop_slide (BOOLEAN) - Prefer sliding along edges to having even widths
    mark_seam (BOOLEAN) - Mark Seams along beveled edges
    mark_sharp (BOOLEAN) - Mark beveled edges as sharp
    harden_normals (BOOLEAN) - Match normals of new faces to adjacent faces
    face_strength_mode (ENUM in FSTR_NONE|FSTR_NEW|FSTR_AFFECTED|FSTR_ALL) - Whether to set face strength, and which faces to set it on
    miter_outer (ENUM in MITER_SHARP|MITER_PATCH|MITER_ARC) - Pattern to use for outside of miters
    miter_inner (ENUM in MITER_SHARP|MITER_ARC) - Pattern to use for inside of miters
    spread (FLOAT) - Spread distance for inner miter arcs
    custom_profile (POINTER) - The path for the custom profile
    vmesh_method (ENUM in ADJ|CUTOFF) - The method to use to create the mesh at intersections

name: modifier:BOOLEAN
text:
BooleanModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='BOOLEAN')
  Use another shape to cut, combine or perform a difference operation
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Mesh object to use for Boolean operation
    collection (POINTER) - Use mesh objects in this collection for Boolean operation
    operation (ENUM in INTERSECT|UNION|DIFFERENCE)
    operand_type (ENUM in OBJECT|COLLECTION)
    double_threshold (FLOAT) - Threshold for checking overlapping geometry
    solver (ENUM in FLOAT|EXACT|MANIFOLD) - Method for calculating booleans
    use_self (BOOLEAN) - Allow self-intersection in operands
    use_hole_tolerant (BOOLEAN) - Better results when there are holes (slower)
    material_mode (ENUM in INDEX|TRANSFER) - Method for setting materials on the new faces
    debug_options (ENUM in SEPARATE|NO_DISSOLVE|NO_CONNECT_REGIONS) - Debugging options, only when started with '-d'

name: modifier:BUILD
text:
BuildModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='BUILD')
  Cause the faces of the mesh object to appear or disappear one after the other over time
  Properties:
    frame_start (FLOAT) - Start frame of the effect
    frame_duration (FLOAT) - Total time the build effect requires
    use_reverse (BOOLEAN) - Deconstruct the mesh instead of building it
    use_random_order (BOOLEAN) - Randomize the faces or edges during build
    seed (INT) - Seed for random if used

name: modifier:DECIMATE
text:
DecimateModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='DECIMATE')
  Reduce the geometry density
  Properties:
    decimate_type (ENUM in COLLAPSE|UNSUBDIV|DISSOLVE)
    ratio (FLOAT) - Ratio of triangles to reduce to (collapse only)
    iterations (INT) - Number of times reduce the geometry (unsubdivide only)
    angle_limit (FLOAT) - Only dissolve angles below this (planar only)
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name (collapse only)
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence (collapse only)
    use_collapse_triangulate (BOOLEAN) - Keep triangulated faces resulting from decimation (collapse only)
    use_symmetry (BOOLEAN) - Maintain symmetry on an axis
    symmetry_axis (ENUM in X|Y|Z) - Axis of symmetry
    vertex_group_factor (FLOAT) - Vertex group strength
    use_dissolve_boundaries (BOOLEAN) - Dissolve all vertices in between face boundaries (planar only)
    delimit (ENUM in NORMAL|MATERIAL|SEAM|SHARP|UV) - Limit merging geometry
    face_count (INT) - The current number of faces in the decimated mesh

name: modifier:EDGE_SPLIT
text:
EdgeSplitModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='EDGE_SPLIT')
  Split away joined faces at the edges
  Properties:
    split_angle (FLOAT) - Angle above which to split edges
    use_edge_angle (BOOLEAN) - Split edges with high angle between faces
    use_edge_sharp (BOOLEAN) - Split edges that are marked as sharp

name: modifier:NODES
text:
NodesModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='NODES')
  Properties:
    node_group (POINTER) - Node group that controls what this modifier does
    bake_directory (STRING) - Location on disk where the bake data is stored
    bake_target (ENUM in PACKED|DISK) - Where to store the baked data
    bakes (COLLECTION)
    panels (COLLECTION)
    show_group_selector (BOOLEAN)
    show_manage_panel (BOOLEAN)
    node_warnings (COLLECTION)
    open_output_attributes_panel (BOOLEAN)
    open_manage_panel (BOOLEAN)
    open_bake_panel (BOOLEAN)
    open_named_attributes_panel (BOOLEAN)
    open_bake_data_blocks_panel (BOOLEAN)
    open_warnings_panel (BOOLEAN)

name: modifier:MASK
text:
MaskModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='MASK')
  Dynamically hide vertices based on a vertex group or armature
  Properties:
    mode (ENUM in VERTEX_GROUP|ARMATURE)
    armature (POINTER) - Armature to use as source of bones to mask
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Use vertices that are not part of region defined
    use_smooth (BOOLEAN) - Use vertex group weights to cut faces at the weight contour
    threshold (FLOAT) - Weights over this threshold remain

name: modifier:MIRROR
text:
MirrorModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='MIRROR')
  Mirror along the local X, Y and/or Z axes, over the object origin
  Properties:
    use_axis (BOOLEAN) - Enable axis mirror
    use_bisect_axis (BOOLEAN) - Cuts the mesh across the mirror plane
    use_bisect_flip_axis (BOOLEAN) - Flips the direction of the slice
    use_clip (BOOLEAN) - Prevent vertices from going through the mirror during transform
    use_mirror_vertex_groups (BOOLEAN) - Mirror vertex groups (e.g. .R->.L)
    use_mirror_merge (BOOLEAN) - Merge vertices within the merge threshold
    use_mirror_u (BOOLEAN) - Mirror the U texture coordinate around the flip offset point
    use_mirror_v (BOOLEAN) - Mirror the V texture coordinate around the flip offset point
    use_mirror_udim (BOOLEAN) - Mirror the texture coordinate around each tile center
    mirror_offset_u (FLOAT) - Amount to offset mirrored UVs flipping point from the 0.5 on the U axis
    mirror_offset_v (FLOAT) - Amount to offset mirrored UVs flipping point from the 0.5 point on the V axis
    offset_u (FLOAT) - Mirrored UV offset on the U axis
    offset_v (FLOAT) - Mirrored UV offset on the V axis
    merge_threshold (FLOAT) - Distance within which mirrored vertices are merged
    bisect_threshold (FLOAT) - Distance from the bisect plane within which vertices are removed
    mirror_object (POINTER) - Object to use as mirror

name: modifier:MULTIRES
text:
MultiresModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='MULTIRES')
  Subdivide the mesh in a way that allows editing the higher subdivision levels
  Properties:
    uv_smooth (ENUM in NONE|PRESERVE_CORNERS|PRESERVE_CORNERS_AND_JUNCTIONS|PRESERVE_CORNERS_JUNCTIONS_AND_CONCAVE|PRESERVE_BOUNDARIES|SMOOTH_ALL) - Controls how smoothing is applied to UVs
    quality (INT) - Accuracy of vertex positions, lower value is faster but less precise
    boundary_smooth (ENUM in PRESERVE_CORNERS|ALL) - Controls how open boundaries are smoothed
    levels (INT) - Number of subdivisions to use in the viewport
    sculpt_levels (INT) - Number of subdivisions to use in sculpt mode
    render_levels (INT) - The subdivision level visible at render time
    total_levels (INT) - Number of subdivisions for which displacements are stored
    is_external (BOOLEAN) - Store multires displacements outside the .blend file, to save memory
    filepath (STRING) - Path to external displacements file
    show_only_control_edges (BOOLEAN) - Skip drawing/rendering of interior subdivided edges
    use_creases (BOOLEAN) - Use mesh crease information to sharpen edges or corners
    use_custom_normals (BOOLEAN) - Interpolates existing custom normals to resulting mesh
    use_sculpt_base_mesh (BOOLEAN) - Make Sculpt Mode tools deform the base mesh while previewing the displacement of higher subdivision levels

name: modifier:REMESH
text:
RemeshModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='REMESH')
  Generate new mesh topology based on the current shape
  Properties:
    mode (ENUM in BLOCKS|SMOOTH|SHARP|VOXEL)
    scale (FLOAT) - The ratio of the largest dimension of the model over the size of the grid
    threshold (FLOAT) - If removing disconnected pieces, minimum size of components to preserve as a ratio of the number of polygons in the largest component
    octree_depth (INT) - Resolution of the octree; higher values give finer details
    sharpness (FLOAT) - Tolerance for outliers; lower values filter noise while higher values will reproduce edges closer to the input
    voxel_size (FLOAT) - Size of the voxel in object space used for volume evaluation. Lower values preserve finer details.
    adaptivity (FLOAT) - Reduces the final face count by simplifying geometry where detail is not needed, generating triangles. A value greater than 0 disables Fix Poles.
    use_remove_disconnected (BOOLEAN)
    use_smooth_shade (BOOLEAN) - Output faces with smooth shading rather than flat shaded

name: modifier:SCREW
text:
ScrewModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SCREW')
  Lathe around an axis, treating the input mesh as a profile
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Object to define the screw axis
    steps (INT) - Number of steps in the revolution
    render_steps (INT) - Number of steps in the revolution
    iterations (INT) - Number of times to apply the screw operation
    axis (ENUM in X|Y|Z) - Screw axis
    angle (FLOAT) - Angle of revolution
    screw_offset (FLOAT) - Offset the revolution along its axis
    merge_threshold (FLOAT) - Limit below which to merge vertices
    use_normal_flip (BOOLEAN) - Flip normals of lathed faces
    use_normal_calculate (BOOLEAN) - Calculate the order of edges (needed for meshes, but not curves)
    use_object_screw_offset (BOOLEAN) - Use the distance between the objects to make a screw
    use_merge_vertices (BOOLEAN) - Merge adjacent vertices (screw offset must be zero)
    use_smooth_shade (BOOLEAN) - Output faces with smooth shading rather than flat shaded
    use_stretch_u (BOOLEAN) - Stretch the U coordinates between 0 and 1 when UVs are present
    use_stretch_v (BOOLEAN) - Stretch the V coordinates between 0 and 1 when UVs are present

name: modifier:SKIN
text:
SkinModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SKIN')
  Create a solid shape from vertices and edges, using the vertex radius to define the thickness
  Properties:
    branch_smoothing (FLOAT) - Smooth complex geometry around branches
    use_smooth_shade (BOOLEAN) - Output faces with smooth shading rather than flat shaded
    use_x_symmetry (BOOLEAN) - Avoid making unsymmetrical quads across the X axis
    use_y_symmetry (BOOLEAN) - Avoid making unsymmetrical quads across the Y axis
    use_z_symmetry (BOOLEAN) - Avoid making unsymmetrical quads across the Z axis

name: modifier:SOLIDIFY
text:
SolidifyModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SOLIDIFY')
  Make the surface thick
  Properties:
    solidify_mode (ENUM in EXTRUDE|NON_MANIFOLD) - Selects the used algorithm
    thickness (FLOAT) - Thickness of the shell
    thickness_clamp (FLOAT) - Offset clamp based on geometry scale
    use_thickness_angle_clamp (BOOLEAN) - Clamp thickness based on angles
    thickness_vertex_group (FLOAT) - Thickness factor to use for zero vertex group influence
    offset (FLOAT) - Offset the thickness from the center
    edge_crease_inner (FLOAT) - Assign a crease to inner edges
    edge_crease_outer (FLOAT) - Assign a crease to outer edges
    edge_crease_rim (FLOAT) - Assign a crease to the edges making up the rim
    material_offset (INT) - Offset material index of generated faces
    material_offset_rim (INT) - Offset material index of generated rim faces
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    shell_vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group that the generated shell geometry will be weighted to
    rim_vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group that the generated rim geometry will be weighted to
    use_rim (BOOLEAN) - Create edge loops between the inner and outer surfaces on face edges (slow, disable when not needed)
    use_even_offset (BOOLEAN) - Maintain thickness by adjusting for sharp corners (slow, disable when not needed)
    use_quality_normals (BOOLEAN) - Calculate normals which result in more even thickness (slow, disable when not needed)
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert the vertex group influence
    use_flat_faces (BOOLEAN) - Make faces use the minimal vertex weight assigned to their vertices (ensures new faces remain parallel to their original ones, slow, disable when not needed)
    use_flip_normals (BOOLEAN) - Invert the face direction
    use_rim_only (BOOLEAN) - Only add the rim to the original data
    nonmanifold_thickness_mode (ENUM in FIXED|EVEN|CONSTRAINTS) - Selects the used thickness algorithm
    nonmanifold_boundary_mode (ENUM in NONE|ROUND|FLAT) - Selects the boundary adjustment algorithm
    nonmanifold_merge_threshold (FLOAT) - Distance within which degenerated geometry is merged
    bevel_convex (FLOAT) - Edge bevel weight to be added to outside edges

name: modifier:SUBSURF
text:
SubsurfModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SUBSURF')
  Split the faces into smaller parts, giving it a smoother appearance
  Properties:
    uv_smooth (ENUM in NONE|PRESERVE_CORNERS|PRESERVE_CORNERS_AND_JUNCTIONS|PRESERVE_CORNERS_JUNCTIONS_AND_CONCAVE|PRESERVE_BOUNDARIES|SMOOTH_ALL) - Controls how smoothing is applied to UVs
    quality (INT) - Accuracy of vertex positions, lower value is faster but less precise
    boundary_smooth (ENUM in PRESERVE_CORNERS|ALL) - Controls how open boundaries are smoothed
    subdivision_type (ENUM in CATMULL_CLARK|SIMPLE) - Select type of subdivision algorithm
    levels (INT) - Number of subdivisions to perform in the 3D viewport
    render_levels (INT) - Number of subdivisions to perform when rendering
    show_only_control_edges (BOOLEAN) - Skip displaying interior subdivided edges
    use_creases (BOOLEAN) - Use mesh crease information to sharpen edges or corners
    use_custom_normals (BOOLEAN) - Interpolates existing custom normals to resulting mesh
    use_limit_surface (BOOLEAN) - Place vertices at the surface that would be produced with infinite levels of subdivision (smoothest possible shape)
    use_adaptive_subdivision (BOOLEAN) - Adaptively subdivide mesh based on camera distance
    adaptive_space (ENUM in PIXEL|OBJECT) - How to adaptively subdivide the mesh
    adaptive_pixel_size (FLOAT) - Target polygon pixel size for adaptive subdivision
    adaptive_object_edge_length (FLOAT) - Target object space edge length for adaptive subdivision
    open_adaptive_subdivision_panel (BOOLEAN)
    open_advanced_panel (BOOLEAN)

name: modifier:TRIANGULATE
text:
TriangulateModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='TRIANGULATE')
  Convert all polygons to triangles
  Properties:
    quad_method (ENUM in BEAUTY|FIXED|FIXED_ALTERNATE|SHORTEST_DIAGONAL|LONGEST_DIAGONAL) - Method for splitting the quads into triangles
    ngon_method (ENUM in BEAUTY|CLIP) - Method for splitting the n-gons into triangles
    min_vertices (INT) - Triangulate only polygons with vertex count greater than or equal to this number
    keep_custom_normals (BOOLEAN) - Try to preserve custom normals.
Warning: Depending on chosen triangulation method, shading may not be fully preserved, "Fixed" method usually gives the best result here

name: modifier:VOLUME_TO_MESH
text:
VolumeToMeshModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='VOLUME_TO_MESH')
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Object
    threshold (FLOAT) - Voxels with a larger value are inside the generated mesh
    adaptivity (FLOAT) - Reduces the final face count by simplifying geometry where detail is not needed
    use_smooth_shade (BOOLEAN) - Output faces with smooth shading rather than flat shaded
    grid_name (STRING) - Grid in the volume object that is converted to a mesh
    resolution_mode (ENUM in GRID|VOXEL_AMOUNT|VOXEL_SIZE) - Mode for how the desired voxel size is specified
    voxel_size (FLOAT) - Smaller values result in a higher resolution output
    voxel_amount (INT) - Approximate number of voxels along one axis

name: modifier:WELD
text:
WeldModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='WELD')
  Find groups of vertices closer than dist and merge them together
  Properties:
    mode (ENUM in ALL|CONNECTED) - Mode defines the merge rule
    merge_threshold (FLOAT) - Limit below which to merge vertices
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for selecting the affected areas
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    loose_edges (BOOLEAN) - Collapse edges without faces, cloth sewing edges

name: modifier:WIREFRAME
text:
WireframeModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='WIREFRAME')
  Convert faces into thickened edges
  Properties:
    thickness (FLOAT) - Thickness factor
    thickness_vertex_group (FLOAT) - Thickness factor to use for zero vertex group influence
    offset (FLOAT) - Offset the thickness from the center
    use_replace (BOOLEAN) - Remove original geometry
    use_boundary (BOOLEAN) - Support face boundaries
    use_even_offset (BOOLEAN) - Scale the offset to give more even thickness
    use_relative_offset (BOOLEAN) - Scale the offset by surrounding geometry
    use_crease (BOOLEAN) - Crease hub edges for improved subdivision surface
    crease_weight (FLOAT) - Crease weight (if active)
    material_offset (INT) - Offset material index of generated faces
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for selecting the affected areas
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:ARMATURE
text:
ArmatureModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='ARMATURE')
  Deform the shape using an armature object
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Armature object to deform with
    use_bone_envelopes (BOOLEAN) - Bind Bone envelopes to armature modifier
    use_vertex_groups (BOOLEAN) - Bind vertex groups to armature modifier
    use_deform_preserve_volume (BOOLEAN) - Deform rotation interpolation with quaternions
    use_multi_modifier (BOOLEAN) - Use same input as previous modifier, and mix results using overall vgroup
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:CAST
text:
CastModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='CAST')
  Shift the shape towards a predefined primitive
  Properties:
    cast_type (ENUM in SPHERE|CYLINDER|CUBOID) - Target object shape
    object (POINTER) - Control object: if available, its location determines the center of the effect
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    use_x (BOOLEAN)
    use_y (BOOLEAN)
    use_z (BOOLEAN)
    use_radius_as_size (BOOLEAN) - Use radius as size of projection shape (0 = auto)
    use_transform (BOOLEAN) - Use object transform to control projection shape
    factor (FLOAT)
    radius (FLOAT) - Only deform vertices within this distance from the center of the effect (leave as 0 for infinite.)
    size (FLOAT) - Size of projection shape (leave as 0 for auto)
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name

name: modifier:CURVE
text:
CurveModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='CURVE')
  Bend the mesh using a curve object
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Curve object to deform with
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    deform_axis (ENUM in POS_X|POS_Y|POS_Z|NEG_X|NEG_Y|NEG_Z) - The axis that the curve deforms along

name: modifier:DISPLACE
text:
DisplaceModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='DISPLACE')
  Offset vertices based on a texture
  Properties:
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    mid_level (FLOAT) - Material value that gives no displacement
    strength (FLOAT) - Amount to displace geometry
    direction (ENUM in X|Y|Z|NORMAL|CUSTOM_NORMAL|RGB_TO_XYZ)
    space (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL)
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    texture (POINTER)
    texture_coords (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL|OBJECT|UV)
    uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    texture_coords_object (POINTER) - Object to set the texture coordinates
    texture_coords_bone (STRING) - Bone to set the texture coordinates

name: modifier:HOOK
text:
HookModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='HOOK')
  Deform specific points using another object
  Properties:
    strength (FLOAT) - Relative force of the hook
    falloff_type (ENUM in NONE|CURVE|SMOOTH|SPHERE|ROOT|INVERSE_SQUARE|SHARP|LINEAR|CONSTANT)
    falloff_radius (FLOAT) - If not zero, the distance from the hook where influence ends
    falloff_curve (POINTER) - Custom falloff curve
    center (FLOAT[3]) - Center of the hook, used for falloff and display
    matrix_inverse (FLOAT[16]) - Reverse the transformation between this object and its target
    object (POINTER) - Parent Object for hook, also recalculates and clears offset
    subtarget (STRING) - Name of Parent Bone for hook (if applicable), also recalculates and clears offset
    use_falloff_uniform (BOOLEAN) - Compensate for non-uniform object scale
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    vertex_indices (INT[64]) - Indices of vertices bound to the modifier. For Bézier curves, handles count as additional vertices.
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:LAPLACIANDEFORM
text:
LaplacianDeformModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='LAPLACIANDEFORM')
  Deform based a series of anchor points
  Properties:
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines Anchors
    iterations (INT)
    is_bind (BOOLEAN) - Whether geometry has been bound to anchors
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:LATTICE
text:
LatticeModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='LATTICE')
  Deform using the shape of a lattice object
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Lattice object to deform with
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    strength (FLOAT) - Strength of modifier effect

name: modifier:MESH_DEFORM
text:
MeshDeformModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='MESH_DEFORM')
  Deform using a different mesh, which acts as a deformation cage
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Mesh object to deform with
    is_bound (BOOLEAN) - Whether geometry has been bound to control cage
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    precision (INT) - The grid size for binding
    use_dynamic_bind (BOOLEAN) - Recompute binding dynamically on top of other deformers (slower and more memory consuming)

name: modifier:SHRINKWRAP
text:
ShrinkwrapModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SHRINKWRAP')
  Project the shape onto another object
  Properties:
    wrap_method (ENUM in NEAREST_SURFACEPOINT|PROJECT|NEAREST_VERTEX|TARGET_PROJECT)
    wrap_mode (ENUM in ON_SURFACE|INSIDE|OUTSIDE|OUTSIDE_SURFACE|ABOVE_SURFACE) - Select how vertices are constrained to the target surface
    cull_face (ENUM in OFF|FRONT|BACK) - Stop vertices from projecting to a face on the target when facing towards/away
    target (POINTER) - Mesh target to shrink to
    auxiliary_target (POINTER) - Additional mesh target to shrink to
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    offset (FLOAT) - Distance to keep from the target
    project_limit (FLOAT) - Limit the distance used for projection (zero disables)
    use_project_x (BOOLEAN)
    use_project_y (BOOLEAN)
    use_project_z (BOOLEAN)
    subsurf_levels (INT) - Number of subdivisions that must be performed before extracting vertices' positions and normals
    use_negative_direction (BOOLEAN) - Allow vertices to move in the negative direction of axis
    use_positive_direction (BOOLEAN) - Allow vertices to move in the positive direction of axis
    use_invert_cull (BOOLEAN) - When projecting in the negative direction invert the face cull mode
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:SIMPLE_DEFORM
text:
SimpleDeformModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SIMPLE_DEFORM')
  Deform the shape by twisting, bending, tapering or stretching
  Properties:
    deform_method (ENUM in TWIST|BEND|TAPER|STRETCH)
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name
    deform_axis (ENUM in X|Y|Z) - Deform around local axis
    origin (POINTER) - Offset the origin and orientation of the deformation
    factor (FLOAT) - Amount to deform object
    angle (FLOAT) - Angle of deformation
    limits (FLOAT[2]) - Lower/Upper limits for deform
    lock_x (BOOLEAN) - Do not allow deformation along the X axis
    lock_y (BOOLEAN) - Do not allow deformation along the Y axis
    lock_z (BOOLEAN) - Do not allow deformation along the Z axis
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:SMOOTH
text:
SmoothModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SMOOTH')
  Smooth the mesh by flattening the angles between adjacent faces
  Properties:
    use_x (BOOLEAN) - Smooth object along X axis
    use_y (BOOLEAN) - Smooth object along Y axis
    use_z (BOOLEAN) - Smooth object along Z axis
    factor (FLOAT) - Strength of modifier effect
    iterations (INT)
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:CORRECTIVE_SMOOTH
text:
CorrectiveSmoothModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='CORRECTIVE_SMOOTH')
  Smooth the mesh while still preserving the volume
  Properties:
    factor (FLOAT) - Smooth effect factor
    iterations (INT)
    scale (FLOAT) - Compensate for scale applied by other modifiers
    rest_source (ENUM in ORCO|BIND) - Select the source of rest positions
    smooth_type (ENUM in SIMPLE|LENGTH_WEIGHTED) - Method used for smoothing
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    is_bind (BOOLEAN)
    use_only_smooth (BOOLEAN) - Apply smoothing without reconstructing the surface
    use_pin_boundary (BOOLEAN) - Excludes boundary vertices from being smoothed

name: modifier:LAPLACIANSMOOTH
text:
LaplacianSmoothModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='LAPLACIANSMOOTH')
  Reduce the noise on a mesh surface with minimal changes to its shape
  Properties:
    use_x (BOOLEAN) - Smooth object along X axis
    use_y (BOOLEAN) - Smooth object along Y axis
    use_z (BOOLEAN) - Smooth object along Z axis
    use_volume_preserve (BOOLEAN) - Apply volume preservation after smooth
    use_normalized (BOOLEAN) - Improve and stabilize the enhanced shape
    lambda_factor (FLOAT) - Smooth effect factor
    lambda_border (FLOAT) - Lambda factor in border
    iterations (INT)
    vertex_group (STRING) - Name of Vertex Group which determines influence of modifier per point
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:SURFACE_DEFORM
text:
SurfaceDeformModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='SURFACE_DEFORM')
  Transfer motion from another mesh
  Properties:
    target (POINTER) - Mesh object to deform with
    falloff (FLOAT) - Controls how much nearby polygons influence deformation
    is_bound (BOOLEAN) - Whether geometry has been bound to target mesh
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for selecting/weighting the affected areas
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    use_sparse_bind (BOOLEAN) - Only record binding data for vertices matching the vertex group at the time of bind
    strength (FLOAT) - Strength of modifier deformations

name: modifier:WARP
text:
WarpModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='WARP')
  Warp parts of a mesh to a new location in a very flexible way thanks to 2 specified objects
  Properties:
    object_from (POINTER) - Object to transform from
    bone_from (STRING) - Bone to transform from
    object_to (POINTER) - Object to transform to
    bone_to (STRING) - Bone defining offset
    strength (FLOAT)
    falloff_type (ENUM in NONE|CURVE|SMOOTH|SPHERE|ROOT|INVERSE_SQUARE|SHARP|LINEAR|CONSTANT)
    falloff_radius (FLOAT) - Radius to apply
    falloff_curve (POINTER) - Custom falloff curve
    use_volume_preserve (BOOLEAN) - Preserve volume when rotations are used
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for modulating the deform
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    texture (POINTER)
    texture_coords (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL|OBJECT|UV)
    uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    texture_coords_object (POINTER) - Object to set the texture coordinates
    texture_coords_bone (STRING) - Bone to set the texture coordinates

name: modifier:WAVE
text:
WaveModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='WAVE')
  Adds a ripple-like motion to an object's geometry
  Properties:
    use_x (BOOLEAN) - X axis motion
    use_y (BOOLEAN) - Y axis motion
    use_cyclic (BOOLEAN) - Cyclic wave effect
    use_normal (BOOLEAN) - Displace along normals
    use_normal_x (BOOLEAN) - Enable displacement along the X normal
    use_normal_y (BOOLEAN) - Enable displacement along the Y normal
    use_normal_z (BOOLEAN) - Enable displacement along the Z normal
    time_offset (FLOAT) - Either the starting frame (for positive speed) or ending frame (for negative speed)
    lifetime (FLOAT) - Lifetime of the wave in frames, zero means infinite
    damping_time (FLOAT) - Number of frames in which the wave damps out after it dies
    falloff_radius (FLOAT) - Distance after which it fades out
    start_position_x (FLOAT) - X coordinate of the start position
    start_position_y (FLOAT) - Y coordinate of the start position
    start_position_object (POINTER) - Object which defines the wave center
    vertex_group (STRING) - Vertex group name for modulating the wave
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence
    speed (FLOAT) - Speed of the wave, towards the starting point when negative
    height (FLOAT) - Height of the wave
    width (FLOAT) - Distance between the waves
    narrowness (FLOAT) - Distance between the top and the base of a wave, the higher the value, the more narrow the wave
    texture (POINTER)
    texture_coords (ENUM in LOCAL|GLOBAL|OBJECT|UV)
    uv_layer (STRING) - UV map name
    texture_coords_object (POINTER) - Object to set the texture coordinates
    texture_coords_bone (STRING) - Bone to set the texture coordinates

name: modifier:CLOTH
text:
ClothModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='CLOTH')
  Physic simulation for cloth
  Properties:
    settings (POINTER)
    collision_settings (POINTER)
    solver_result (POINTER)
    point_cache (POINTER)
    hair_grid_min (FLOAT[3])
    hair_grid_max (FLOAT[3])
    hair_grid_resolution (INT[3])

name: modifier:COLLISION
text:

name: modifier:EXPLODE
text:
ExplodeModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='EXPLODE')
  Break apart the mesh faces and let them follow particles
  Properties:
    vertex_group (STRING)
    protect (FLOAT) - Clean vertex group edges
    use_edge_cut (BOOLEAN) - Cut face edges for nicer shrapnel
    show_unborn (BOOLEAN) - Show mesh when particles are unborn
    show_alive (BOOLEAN) - Show mesh when particles are alive
    show_dead (BOOLEAN) - Show mesh when particles are dead
    use_size (BOOLEAN) - Use particle size for the shrapnel
    particle_uv (STRING) - UV map to change with particle age
    invert_vertex_group (BOOLEAN) - Invert vertex group influence

name: modifier:FLUID

name: modifier:OCEAN
text:
OceanModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='OCEAN')
  Generate a moving ocean surface
  Properties:
    geometry_mode (ENUM in GENERATE|DISPLACE) - Method of modifying geometry
    size (FLOAT) - Surface scale factor (does not affect the height of the waves)
    repeat_x (INT) - Repetitions of the generated surface in X
    repeat_y (INT) - Repetitions of the generated surface in Y
    use_normals (BOOLEAN) - Output normals for bump mapping - disabling can speed up performance if it's not needed
    use_foam (BOOLEAN) - Generate foam mask as a vertex color channel
    use_spray (BOOLEAN) - Generate map of spray direction as a vertex color channel
    invert_spray (BOOLEAN) - Invert the spray direction map
    spray_layer_name (STRING) - Name of the vertex color layer used for the spray direction map
    resolution (INT) - Resolution of the generated surface for rendering and baking
    viewport_resolution (INT) - Viewport resolution of the generated surface
    spatial_size (INT) - Size of the simulation domain (in meters), and of the generated geometry (in BU)
    wind_velocity (FLOAT) - Wind speed
    damping (FLOAT) - Damp reflected waves going in opposite direction to the wind
    wave_scale_min (FLOAT) - Shortest allowed wavelength
    wave_alignment (FLOAT) - How much the waves are aligned to each other
    wave_direction (FLOAT) - Main direction of the waves when they are (partially) aligned
    wave_scale (FLOAT) - Scale of the displacement effect
    depth (FLOAT) - Depth of the solid ground below the water surface
    foam_coverage (FLOAT) - Amount of generated foam
    bake_foam_fade (FLOAT) - How much foam accumulates over time (baked ocean only)
    foam_layer_name (STRING) - Name of the vertex color layer used for foam
    choppiness (FLOAT) - Choppiness of the wave's crest (adds some horizontal component to the displacement)
    time (FLOAT) - Current time of the simulation
    spectrum (ENUM in PHILLIPS|PIERSON_MOSKOWITZ|JONSWAP|TEXEL_MARSEN_ARSLOE) - Spectrum to use
    fetch_jonswap (FLOAT) - This is the distance from a lee shore, called the fetch, or the distance over which the wind blows with constant velocity. Used by 'JONSWAP' and 'TMA' models.
    sharpen_peak_jonswap (FLOAT) - Peak sharpening for 'JONSWAP' and 'TMA' models
    random_seed (INT) - Seed of the random generator
    frame_start (INT) - Start frame of the ocean baking
    frame_end (INT) - End frame of the ocean baking
    is_cached (BOOLEAN) - Whether the ocean is using cached data or simulating
    filepath (STRING) - Path to a folder to store external baked images

name: modifier:PARTICLE_INSTANCE
text:
ParticleInstanceModifier  —  obj.modifiers.new(name, type='PARTICLE_INSTANCE')
  Duplicate mesh at the location of particles
  Properties:
    object (POINTER) - Object that has the particle system
    particle_system_index (INT)
    particle_system (POINTER)
    axis (ENUM in X|Y|Z) - Pole axis for rotation
    space (ENUM in LOCAL|WORLD) - Space to use for copying mesh data
    use_normal (BOOLEAN) - Create instances from normal particles
    use_children (BOOLEAN) - Create instances from child particles
    use_path (BOOLEAN) - Create instances along particle paths
    show_unborn (BOOLEAN) - Show instances when particles are unborn
    show_alive (BOOLEAN) - Show instances when particles are alive
    show_dead (BOOLEAN) - Show instances when particles are dead
    use_preserve_shape (BOOLEAN) - Don't stretch the object
    use_size (BOOLEAN) - Use particle size to scale the instances
    position (FLOAT) - Position along path
    random_position (FLOAT) - Randomize position along path
    rotation (FLOAT) - Rotation around path
    random_rotation (FLOAT) - Randomize rotation around path
    particle_amount (FLOAT) - Amount of particles to use for instancing
    particle_offset (FLOAT) - Relative offset of particles to use for instancing, to avoid overlap of multiple instances
    index_layer_name (STRING) - Custom data layer name for the index
    value_layer_name (STRING) - Custom data layer name for the randomized value

name: modifier:PARTICLE_SYSTEM

name: bpy.types.Curve
tags: data type Curve spline bezier curve mesh point co
text:
bpy.types.Curve  (data API — set via Python, not operators)
  Curve data-block storing curves, splines and NURBS
  Properties:
    name (STRING) - Unique data-block ID name (within a same type and library)
    name_full (STRING) - Unique data-block ID name, including library one if any
    id_type (ENUM in ACTION|ARMATURE|BRUSH|CACHEFILE|CAMERA|COLLECTION|CURVE|CURVES|FONT|GREASEPENCIL|GREASEPENCIL_V3|IMAGE|KEY|LATTICE|LIBRARY|LIGHT|LIGHT_PROBE|LINESTYLE|MASK|MATERIAL|MESH|META|MOVIECLIP|NODETREE|OBJECT|PAINTCURVE|PALETTE|PARTICLE|POINTCLOUD|SCENE|SCREEN|SOUND|SPEAKER|TEXT|TEXTURE|VOLUME|WINDOWMANAGER|WORKSPACE|WORLD) - Type identifier of this data-block
    session_uid (INT) - A session-wide unique identifier for the data block that remains the same across renames and internal reallocations, unchanged when reloading the file
    is_evaluated (BOOLEAN) - Whether this ID is runtime-only, evaluated data-block, or actual data from .blend file
    original (POINTER) - Actual data-block from .blend file (Main database) that generated that evaluated one
    users (INT) - Number of times this data-block is referenced
    use_fake_user (BOOLEAN) - Save this data-block even if it has no users
    use_extra_user (BOOLEAN) - Indicates whether an extra user is set or not (mainly for internal/debug usages)
    is_embedded_data (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is not an independent one, but is actually a sub-data of another ID (typical example: root node trees or master collections)
    is_linked_packed (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is linked and packed into the .blend file
    is_missing (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is a place-holder for missing linked data (i.e. it is [an override of] a linked data that could not be found anymore)
    is_runtime_data (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is runtime data, i.e. it won't be saved in .blend file. Note that e.g. evaluated IDs are always runtime, so this value is only editable for data-blocks in Main data-base.
    is_editable (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is editable in the user interface. Linked data-blocks are not editable, except if they were loaded as editable assets.
    tag (BOOLEAN) - Tools can use this to tag data for their own purposes (initial state is undefined)
    is_library_indirect (BOOLEAN) - Is this ID block linked indirectly
    library (POINTER) - Library file the data-block is linked from
    library_weak_reference (POINTER) - Weak reference to a data-block in another library .blend file (used to re-use already appended data instead of appending new copies)
    asset_data (POINTER) - Additional data for an asset data-block
    override_library (POINTER) - Library override data
    preview (POINTER) - Preview image and icon of this data-block (always None if not supported for this type of data)
    shape_keys (POINTER)
    splines (COLLECTION) - Collection of splines in this curve data object
    path_duration (INT) - The number of frames that are needed to traverse the path, defining the maximum value for the 'Evaluation Time' setting
    use_path (BOOLEAN) - Enable the curve to become a translation path
    use_path_follow (BOOLEAN) - Make curve path children rotate along the path
    use_path_clamp (BOOLEAN) - Clamp the curve path children so they cannot travel past the start/end point of the curve
    use_stretch (BOOLEAN) - Option for curve-deform: make deformed child stretch along entire path
    use_deform_bounds (BOOLEAN) - Option for curve-deform: Use the mesh bounds to clamp the deformation
    use_radius (BOOLEAN) - Option for paths and curve-deform: apply the curve radius to objects following it and to deformed objects
    bevel_mode (ENUM in ROUND|OBJECT|PROFILE) - Determine how to build the curve's bevel geometry
    bevel_profile (POINTER) - The path for the curve's custom profile
    bevel_resolution (INT) - The number of segments in each quarter-circle of the bevel
    offset (FLOAT) - Distance to move the curve parallel to its normals
    extrude (FLOAT) - Length of the depth added in the local Z direction along the curve, perpendicular to its normals
    bevel_depth (FLOAT) - Radius of the bevel geometry, not including extrusion
    resolution_u (INT) - Number of computed points in the U direction between every pair of control points
    resolution_v (INT) - The number of computed points in the V direction between every pair of control points
    render_resolution_u (INT) - Surface resolution in U direction used while rendering (zero uses preview resolution)
    render_resolution_v (INT) - Surface resolution in V direction used while rendering (zero uses preview resolution)
    eval_time (FLOAT) - Parametric position along the length of the curve that Objects 'following' it should be at (position is evaluated by dividing by the 'Path Length' value)
    bevel_object (POINTER) - The name of the Curve object that defines the bevel shape
    taper_object (POINTER) - Curve object name that defines the taper (width)
    dimensions (ENUM in 2D|3D) - Select 2D or 3D curve type
    fill_mode (ENUM in FULL|BACK|FRONT|HALF) - Mode of filling curve
    fill_solver (ENUM in SWEEP_LINE|CDT) - Triangulation solver for filling 2D curves
    fill_rule (ENUM in EVEN_ODD|NONZERO) - Fill rule for Delaunay fill solver
    twist_mode (ENUM in Z_UP|MINIMUM|TANGENT) - The type of tilt calculation for 3D Curves
    taper_radius_mode (ENUM in OVERRIDE|MULTIPLY|ADD) - Determine how the effective radius of the spline point is computed when a taper object is specified
    bevel_factor_mapping_start (ENUM in RESOLUTION|SEGMENTS|SPLINE) - Determine how the geometry start factor is mapped to a spline
    bevel_factor_mapping_end (ENUM in RESOLUTION|SEGMENTS|SPLINE) - Determine how the geometry end factor is mapped to a spline
    twist_smooth (FLOAT) - Smoothing iteration for tangents
    use_fill_caps (BOOLEAN) - Fill caps for beveled curves
    use_map_taper (BOOLEAN) - Map effect of the taper object to the beveled part of the curve
    use_auto_texspace (BOOLEAN) - Adjust active object's texture space automatically when transforming object
    texspace_location (FLOAT[3])
    texspace_size (FLOAT[3])
    materials (COLLECTION)
    bevel_factor_start (FLOAT) - Define where along the spline the curve geometry starts (0 for the beginning, 1 for the end)
    bevel_factor_end (FLOAT) - Define where along the spline the curve geometry ends (0 for the beginning, 1 for the end)
    is_editmode (BOOLEAN) - True when used in editmode
    animation_data (POINTER) - Animation data for this data-block
    cycles (POINTER) - Cycles mesh settings

name: bpy.types.Spline
tags: data type Spline spline bezier curve mesh point co
text:
bpy.types.Spline  (data API — set via Python, not operators)
  Element of a curve, either NURBS, Bézier or Polyline or a character with text objects
  Properties:
    points (COLLECTION) - Collection of points that make up this poly or nurbs spline
    bezier_points (COLLECTION) - Collection of points for Bézier curves only
    tilt_interpolation (ENUM in LINEAR|CARDINAL|BSPLINE|EASE) - The type of tilt interpolation for 3D, Bézier curves
    radius_interpolation (ENUM in LINEAR|CARDINAL|BSPLINE|EASE) - The type of radius interpolation for Bézier curves
    type (ENUM in POLY|BEZIER|NURBS) - The interpolation type for this curve element
    point_count_u (INT) - Total number points for the curve or surface in the U direction
    point_count_v (INT) - Total number points for the surface on the V direction
    order_u (INT) - NURBS order in the U direction. Higher values make each point influence a greater area, but have worse performance.
    order_v (INT) - NURBS order in the V direction. Higher values make each point influence a greater area, but have worse performance.
    resolution_u (INT) - Curve or Surface subdivisions per segment
    resolution_v (INT) - Surface subdivisions per segment
    use_cyclic_u (BOOLEAN) - Make this curve or surface a closed loop in the U direction
    use_cyclic_v (BOOLEAN) - Make this surface a closed loop in the V direction
    use_endpoint_u (BOOLEAN) - Make this nurbs curve or surface meet the endpoints in the U direction
    use_endpoint_v (BOOLEAN) - Make this nurbs surface meet the endpoints in the V direction
    use_bezier_u (BOOLEAN) - Make this nurbs curve or surface act like a Bézier spline in the U direction
    use_bezier_v (BOOLEAN) - Make this nurbs surface act like a Bézier spline in the V direction
    use_smooth (BOOLEAN) - Smooth the normals of the surface or beveled curve
    hide (BOOLEAN) - Hide this curve in Edit mode
    material_index (INT) - Material slot index of this curve
    character_index (INT) - Location of this character in the text data (only for text curves)

name: bpy.types.BezierSplinePoint

name: bpy.types.Mesh
tags: data type Mesh spline bezier curve mesh point co
text:
bpy.types.Mesh  (data API — set via Python, not operators)
  Mesh data-block defining geometric surfaces
  Properties:
    name (STRING) - Unique data-block ID name (within a same type and library)
    name_full (STRING) - Unique data-block ID name, including library one if any
    id_type (ENUM in ACTION|ARMATURE|BRUSH|CACHEFILE|CAMERA|COLLECTION|CURVE|CURVES|FONT|GREASEPENCIL|GREASEPENCIL_V3|IMAGE|KEY|LATTICE|LIBRARY|LIGHT|LIGHT_PROBE|LINESTYLE|MASK|MATERIAL|MESH|META|MOVIECLIP|NODETREE|OBJECT|PAINTCURVE|PALETTE|PARTICLE|POINTCLOUD|SCENE|SCREEN|SOUND|SPEAKER|TEXT|TEXTURE|VOLUME|WINDOWMANAGER|WORKSPACE|WORLD) - Type identifier of this data-block
    session_uid (INT) - A session-wide unique identifier for the data block that remains the same across renames and internal reallocations, unchanged when reloading the file
    is_evaluated (BOOLEAN) - Whether this ID is runtime-only, evaluated data-block, or actual data from .blend file
    original (POINTER) - Actual data-block from .blend file (Main database) that generated that evaluated one
    users (INT) - Number of times this data-block is referenced
    use_fake_user (BOOLEAN) - Save this data-block even if it has no users
    use_extra_user (BOOLEAN) - Indicates whether an extra user is set or not (mainly for internal/debug usages)
    is_embedded_data (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is not an independent one, but is actually a sub-data of another ID (typical example: root node trees or master collections)
    is_linked_packed (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is linked and packed into the .blend file
    is_missing (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is a place-holder for missing linked data (i.e. it is [an override of] a linked data that could not be found anymore)
    is_runtime_data (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is runtime data, i.e. it won't be saved in .blend file. Note that e.g. evaluated IDs are always runtime, so this value is only editable for data-blocks in Main data-base.
    is_editable (BOOLEAN) - This data-block is editable in the user interface. Linked data-blocks are not editable, except if they were loaded as editable assets.
    tag (BOOLEAN) - Tools can use this to tag data for their own purposes (initial state is undefined)
    is_library_indirect (BOOLEAN) - Is this ID block linked indirectly
    library (POINTER) - Library file the data-block is linked from
    library_weak_reference (POINTER) - Weak reference to a data-block in another library .blend file (used to re-use already appended data instead of appending new copies)
    asset_data (POINTER) - Additional data for an asset data-block
    override_library (POINTER) - Library override data
    preview (POINTER) - Preview image and icon of this data-block (always None if not supported for this type of data)
    vertices (COLLECTION) - Vertices of the mesh
    edges (COLLECTION) - Edges of the mesh
    loops (COLLECTION) - Loops of the mesh (face corners)
    polygons (COLLECTION) - Polygons of the mesh
    normals_domain (ENUM in POINT|FACE|CORNER) - The attribute domain that gives enough information to represent the mesh's normals
    vertex_normals (COLLECTION) - The normal direction of each vertex, defined as the average of the surrounding face normals
    polygon_normals (COLLECTION) - The normal direction of each face, defined by the winding order and position of its vertices
    corner_normals (COLLECTION) - The "slit" normal direction of each face corner, influenced by vertex normals, sharp faces, sharp edges, and custom normals. May be empty.
    loop_triangles (COLLECTION) - Tessellation of mesh polygons into triangles
    loop_triangle_polygons (COLLECTION) - The face index for each loop triangle
    texture_mesh (POINTER) - Use another mesh for texture indices (vertex indices must be aligned)
    uv_layers (COLLECTION) - All UV loop layers
    uv_layer_clone (POINTER) - UV loop layer to be used as cloning source
    uv_layer_clone_index (INT) - Clone UV loop layer index
    uv_layer_stencil (POINTER) - UV loop layer to mask the painted area
    uv_layer_stencil_index (INT) - Mask UV loop layer index
    vertex_colors (COLLECTION) - Legacy vertex color layers. Deprecated, use color attributes instead.
    skin_vertices (COLLECTION) - All skin vertices
    attributes (COLLECTION) - Geometry attributes
    color_attributes (COLLECTION) - Geometry color attributes
    remesh_voxel_size (FLOAT) - Size of the voxel in object space used for volume evaluation. Lower values preserve finer details.
    remesh_voxel_adaptivity (FLOAT) - Reduces the final face count by simplifying geometry where detail is not needed, generating triangles. A value greater than 0 disables Fix Poles.
    use_remesh_fix_poles (BOOLEAN) - Produces fewer poles and a better topology flow
    use_remesh_preserve_volume (BOOLEAN) - Projects the mesh to preserve the volume and details of the original mesh
    use_remesh_preserve_attributes (BOOLEAN) - Transfer all attributes to the new mesh
    remesh_mode (ENUM in VOXEL|QUAD)
    use_mirror_x (BOOLEAN) - Enable symmetry in the X axis
    use_mirror_y (BOOLEAN) - Enable symmetry in the Y axis
    use_mirror_z (BOOLEAN) - Enable symmetry in the Z axis
    use_mirror_vertex_groups (BOOLEAN) - Mirror the left/right vertex groups when painting. The symmetry axis is determined by the symmetry settings.
    radial_symmetry (INT[3]) - Number of mirrored regions around a central axis
    has_custom_normals (BOOLEAN) - True if there is custom normal data for this mesh
    texco_mesh (POINTER) - Derive texture coordinates from another mesh
    shape_keys (POINTER)
    use_auto_texspace (BOOLEAN) - Adjust active object's texture space automatically when transforming object
    use_mirror_topology (BOOLEAN) - Use topology based mirroring (for when both sides of mesh have matching, unique topology)
    use_paint_bone_selection (BOOLEAN) - Bone selection during painting
    use_paint_mask (BOOLEAN) - Face selection masking for painting
    use_paint_mask_vertex (BOOLEAN) - Vertex selection masking for painting
    total_vert_sel (INT) - Selected vertex count in editmode
    total_edge_sel (INT) - Selected edge count in editmode
    total_face_sel (INT) - Selected face count in editmode
    is_editmode (BOOLEAN) - True when used in editmode
    animation_data (POINTER) - Animation data for this data-block
    auto_texspace (BOOLEAN) - Adjust active object's texture space automatically when transforming object
    texspace_location (FLOAT[3]) - Texture space location
    texspace_size (FLOAT[3]) - Texture space size
    materials (COLLECTION)
    cycles (POINTER) - Cycles mesh settings

name: bpy.types.MeshPolygon
tags: data type MeshPolygon spline bezier curve mesh point co
text:
bpy.types.MeshPolygon  (data API — set via Python, not operators)
  Polygon in a Mesh data-block
  Properties:
    vertices (INT[3]) - Vertex indices
    loop_start (INT) - Index of the first loop of this face
    loop_total (INT) - Number of loops used by this face
    material_index (INT) - Material slot index of this face
    select (BOOLEAN)
    hide (BOOLEAN)
    use_smooth (BOOLEAN)
    normal (FLOAT[3]) - Local space unit length normal vector for this face
    center (FLOAT[3]) - Center of this face
    area (FLOAT) - Read only area of this face
    index (INT) - Index of this face
